blocks.text: Glimt stun Sporting; Hovland hunts the fifth major at Sawgrass
Hovland sits T17 (-1) after Round 2 — within striking distance at TPC Sawgrass. Liverpool stumbled at Galatasaray, but Arsenal's 7-point lead holds heading into a defining weekend.
🎮 CS2 — rain (FaZe) battles on in ESL Pro League S22, ongoing

blocks.label: ⚽ Weekend must-watches
items: ⚽ Arsenal vs Everton — Sat 18:30, Gunners (1st, 67pts) can stretch the gap
⚽ Chelsea vs Newcastle — Sat 18:30, top-four battle in west London
⚽ West Ham vs Man City — Sat 21:00, City need points after Bernabéu humbling
⚽ Real Madrid vs Elche — Sat 21:00, Madrid's La Liga title push at home
⚽ Barcelona vs Sevilla — Sun 16:15, Camp Nou title showdown
